properties.name: app.jwt.secret
properties.description: Secret key used to sign and verify JWT access/refresh tokens.

properties.name: app.jwt.expiration
properties.description: JWT access token expiration time, in milliseconds.

properties.name: app.jwt.refresh-expiration
properties.description: JWT refresh token expiration time, in milliseconds.

properties.name: app.cors.allowed-origins
properties.description: Comma-separated list of origins allowed to call the API (CORS).

properties.name: app.ai.service.url
properties.description: Base URL of the Python AI microservice used for crowd analysis.

properties.name: app.email.from
properties.description: The "from" address used when the backend sends transactional emails.

properties.name: app.frontend.url
properties.description: Base URL of the deployed frontend, used to build links in outgoing emails.

properties.name: app.file.upload-dir
properties.description: Local directory where uploaded camera frames/videos are stored.

properties.name: app.file.report-dir
properties.description: Local directory where generated PDF/Excel reports are stored.
